sections.paragraph:
Original: שׂדי שׂדה

Transliteration: śâdeh śâday

Phonetic: saw-deh'

BDB Definition:

  1. field, land
    1. cultivated field
    2. of home of wild beasts
    3. plain (opposed to mountain)
    4. land (opposed to sea)

Origin: from an unused root meaning to spread out

TWOT entry: 2236a,2236b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
